zh.St Endellion, Cornwall, England: 英國可瓦爾聖 恩德利
zh.lifeSummary: Roselyn de Hendresuk - Heiress of Endellion於大約1227年出生在英國可瓦爾。她於大約1240年與Philip de Bodrugan在英國結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1326年在英國可瓦爾聖 恩德利享年100歲。

zh-hans.St Endellion, Cornwall, England: 英国可瓦爾聖 恩德利
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Roselyn de Hendresuk - Heiress of Endellion于大约1227年出生在英国可瓦爾。她于大约1240年与Philip de Bodrugan在英国结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1326年在英国可瓦爾聖 恩德利享年100岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Korean Kyong, Kyong Suk, Young, Chae, Chi Young, Hang, Kil, Rin, Sang Hun, Chang, Chong, Insoo, Kum, Sun Young, Yom, Young Hwan.  Cambodian Kiwan, Oeurn, Phoeun, Pich, Saroeuth, Seung, Sophath, Sophea, Yoeun, Phan, Son.  Indian Shanti, Harendra.
Indian (Uttar Pradesh): Brahmin name, from Sanskrit om, the Hindu sacred and mystic syllable uttered at the beginning of prayers.
Cambodian: written ឱម, corresponding to the exclamation of solemn affirmation, of Sanskrit origin (see 1 above), chanted by Buddhist monks.

variants.name: Oum
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Southeast Asian Heang, Hye, Kam, Kan, Kheng, Khin, Kun, Sang, Sok, Phong, Yom, Yoo, Youn, Cuong, Phal, Samnang, Tin.  Cambodian Sokha, Chheang, Choeun, Moeun, Roeun, Sambath, Samoeun, Savuth, Soeun, Sopheap.
Cambodian: written អ៊ុំ, from a Khmer word denoting an elder sibling of one's parent (i.e. ‘uncle’ or ‘aunt’). Compare   Om   3 and   Um   2.

nameMeanings.name: Roselyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Altered form of Rosalind . Rosalin was a common medieval form, since the letters d and t were often added or dropped capriciously at the end of words after n. The name has been further influenced by the productive suffix -lyn ( see Lynn ).

variants.name: Rosalynn
meanings: Altered form of Rosalind . Rosalin was a common medieval form, since the letters d and t were often added or dropped capriciously at the end of words after n. The name has been further influenced by the productive suffix -lyn ( see Lynn ).

variants.name: Rosalynne
meanings: Altered form of Rosalind . Rosalin was a common medieval form, since the letters d and t were often added or dropped capriciously at the end of words after n. The name has been further influenced by the productive suffix -lyn ( see Lynn ).

variants.name: Rosaleen
meanings: Variant of Rosalyn , influenced by the suffix -een (in origin the Irish Gaelic diminutive -ín). ‘Dark Rosaleen’ was the title of a poem by James Clarence Mangan ( 1803–49 ), based on the Gaelic poem Róisín Dubh; in it the name is used as a figurative allusion to the Irish nation.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: Roselyn de Hendresuk - Heiress of Endellion was born about 1227, in Cornwall, England. She married Philip de Bodrugan about 1240, in England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1326, in St Endellion, Cornwall, England, at the age of 100.

fr.lifeSummary: Roselyn de Hendresuk - Heiress of Endellion est née environ 1227, à Cornouailles, Angleterre. Elle a épousé Philip de Bodrugan environ 1240, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1326, à St Endellion, Cornouailles, Angleterre, à l’âge de 100 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Roselyn de Hendresuk - Heiress of Endellion wurde um 1227 in Cornwall, England geboren. Sie hat um 1240 in England Philip de Bodrugan geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1326 im Alter von 100 Jahren in St Endellion, Cornwall, England.

it.lifeSummary: Roselyn de Hendresuk - Heiress of Endellion è nata il circa 1227 nel Cornwall, England. Lei sposato Philip de Bodrugan circa 1240, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1326, nel St Endellion, Cornwall, England, all'età di 100 anni.

ja.St Endellion, Cornwall, England: イギリスコルンワルスト エンデリオン
ja.Bodrugan Manor, Cornwall, England, UK: イギリスイギリスコルンワル
ja.Bodrugan, Cornwall, England: イギリスイギリスコルンワル
ja.Tremodred, Cornwall, England, UK: イギリスイギリスコルンワル
ja.lifeSummary: Roselyn de Hendresuk - Heiress of Endellionは約1227年にイギリスコルンワルで生まれた。約1240年にイギリスでPhilip de Bodruganと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1326年にイギリスコルンワルスト エンデリオンで100歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Roselyn de Hendresuk - Heiress of Endellion(은)는 대략 1227년 영국 코른월에서 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1240년 영국에서 Philip de Bodrugan(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1326년 영국 코른월 스트 엔들리언에서 100세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Roselyn de Hendresuk - Heiress of Endellion nasceu aproximadamente 1227, em Cornwall, Inglaterra. Ela casou-se com Philip de Bodrugan aproximadamente 1240, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1326, em St Endellion, Cornwall, Inglaterra, com 100 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Roselyn de Hendresuk - Heiress of Endellion родилась около 1227 г. в местности корнвалл, Англия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Philip de Bodrugan около 1240 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1326 г. в местности ст энделлион, корнвалл, Англия в возрасте 100 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Roselyn de Hendresuk - Heiress of Endellion nació aproximadamente 1227, en Cornwall, Inglaterra. Se casó con Philip de Bodrugan aproximadamente 1240, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1326, en St Endellion, Cornwall, Inglaterra, a la edad de 100 años.
